examples: Don't mention it, I have had heatstroke for several times.
Not enough cooling power could mean heatstroke or dehydration.
The biggest killers in the desert are heatstroke and dehydration, which come on very quickly.
Having suffered heatstroke the previous day Peter had been kept back at base, but he saw his injured friends brought in.
In early August, Russia media reported that doctors in Moscow were being told not to diagnose heatstroke as a cause of death.
